title: danthonia pinetorum
intro: Danthonia pinetorum, also known as Pine Danthonia, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and has been used to treat conditions like skin irritations and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pine Danthonia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
